identity.name: Browser — Credential Paste into Untrusted Origin
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-001. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1552. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-BROWSER-001. Plane: BROWSER. Primary technique: T1552. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-BROWSER-001.
UC: Browser DLP — Credential Disclosure / TC: User Pastes SSO Credential Pattern Into Non-Sanctioned Form.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-BROWSER-001 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm cortex-browser-attacker is registered
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe browser_attack_runner \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'
# step-2: Drive Prisma Browser to phishing form via browser_attack_runner
cat > /tmp/sim-browser-001-eal.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-BROWSER-001
name: "Browser — credential paste"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.cortexsim-test.invalid
dry_run: false
tags: [browser, prisma-browser, credential-paste]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: browser_attack_runner
    params:
      campaign_path: scenarios/browser/campaigns/cred-paste.yml
      allowlist_host: login.cortexsim-test.invalid
      browser_channel: prisma
      headless: true
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/sim-browser-001-eal.yml --live
# step-3: Verify PB → XSIAM telemetry path delivered the alert
echo "[CortexSim] Confirm corresponding alert in XSIAM (manual step)."
echo "[CortexSim] XQL: dataset = prisma_browser_dlp"
echo "[CortexSim]      | filter cortex_canary = 'CANARY-CRED-001'"
